title: Idempotent Consumers, Inbox Records, and External Effects · Independent Type Trial
summary: An independent integration team receives different traffic, tenant, topology, schema, and failure constraints and transfers idempotent consumers, inbox records, and external effects into a new durable inbox and duplicate-safe effect protocol. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of durable inbox and duplicate-safe effect protocol with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and e…
objectives: Derive a stable scoped operation identity from producer intent, tenant, message type, and semantic version rather than delivery metadata.
Record inbox identity, input fingerprint, state transition, domain effect, and completion atomically in one database transaction where possible.
Reject reuse of an operation identity with a different payload fingerprint or semantic intent and retain conflict evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Commit to the mission model · Lab Stable Idempotency Key
steps.instruction:
lab case — A lab messaging team handles case 4837 in a multi-tenant case event backbone with three subscriber responsibilities. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to reject fingerprint conflicts, suppress completed duplicates, and preserve external ambiguity; record causal telemetry without message IDs as metric labels; then raise a broker resource alarm and stop new publisher admission. Browser code models pure messaging decisions only. amqplib, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, external effects, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Commit to the mission model · Lab Stable Idempotency Key.

For RabbitMQ and TypeScript Commit to the mission model · Lab Stable Idempotency Key, keep Stable Idempotency Key connected to executable TypeScript messaging decision evidence.

Browser code models pure messaging decisions only. amqplib, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, external effects, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Set inbox retention from maximum redelivery, replay, audit, privacy, and disaster-recovery windows and test expired-key behavior.
